samples.label: Sample maps
samples.hint: Curated .hideout files shipped under input/hideout/. Picking one runs the same flow as a file upload.

marker.hint: After loading .hideout, the object type with the most instances in the file is selected by default (by doodad name).
marker.choiceLabel: Marker object selection (name as in doodads)
marker.nameHint: Autocomplete suggestions include only names from uploaded .hideout
marker.applyTitle: Rebuild vertex chain using current marker name

order.hint: On the preview at right, select a vertex by click or marquee; with selection active, mouse wheel over polygon cycles vertex position.
order.nearestTitle: From first marker point in file: each next point is nearest of remaining points
order.polarTitle: Sort by angle around centroid (often gives convex contour)

preview.hint: Pale dots are other map objects; green contour is boundary marker (red dashed means self-intersection). Select vertex by click or marquee; click background without dragging clears selection. Mouse wheel over polygon (with selected vertex) changes vertex index in contour with wrap-around.

save.createBaseHint: Server will set exported .hideout title from uploaded file name (if available) or from “Map name”.
save.disabledHint: Buttons are disabled until a contour with at least three vertices exists: upload .hideout, choose boundary marker, and build point order in “Vertex order”.

status.markerTooFew: Less than 2 points found by marker name — specify marker name from .hideout.
status.autoOrderFallback: {{count}} points extracted; automatic ordering did not find a non-self-intersecting contour — adjust manually.
status.heuristicNoSimple: Could not build a closed non-self-intersecting contour for these points — change marker or reorder manually.
status.heuristicApplied: A non-self-intersecting contour has been built.
status.heuristicFallback: Fallback non-self-intersecting contour variant has been applied.
status.ringSelfIntersects: Contour is self-intersecting — fix vertex order before saving.
status.needThreeMarkerPoints: At least 3 points for selected marker are required — check marker name (or all points matched same filter).
